description: §14.8.9 SSE egress (§37) — each data: frame a `server function*` generator yields is a compiler-emitted client-egress serializer; a protected row in the yielded data is stripped at the frame sink and fires I-PROTECT-STRIP-001. The compile-time half of the SSE egress floor (item 6 codes). RUNTIME NOTE: the emitted SSE frame bytes are not asserted — the harness has no EventSource driver (adapter-gated, see ss60.progress).
rationale: §14.8.9 Composition: each data: frame a server function* yields (both the {event,data} shape and the bare-value shape) SHALL apply the same redact-at-sink. A protected row reaching the yield strips passwordHash at the data: frame; I-PROTECT-STRIP-001 names the stripped column.
